title: Crypto is the new money
author: neglected_phrasing
selftext:
For young professionals or investors, cryptocurrencies sound like the business of the future. Although many people tend to buy only a few units to keep, hoping for potential growth in the future, active investors are dedicated to buying and selling crypto, maximizing their profit and revenue.

However, it’s not smart to throw yourself into the cryptocurrency universe without a plan and strategy like any new business. Experts warn that, with a large number of cryptocurrency options available, some may disappear from the market in a few years and never pay back the investment. But with good planning and strategy, who knows, you might be lucky to see your investment skyrocket, as happened with Bitcoin. Or, better yet, in just a few years, crypto will completely replace traditional money, and you will be one of the pioneers in this brave new world. That is why cryptocurrency is rising in popularity.

It is also important to note that the crypt is already much more papular than it was a year or 2 years ago. Moreover, the choice of tools for storing or trading crypto is also increasing. What does this mean for us? That we need to choose the best. Binance, in my opinion, is still the top exchange, but with wallets, everything is not so clear. For example, metamask or trust do not seem so convenient to me. I noticed a new wallet, which will be in beta only at the end of this month. SendCrypto. Why does he seem better to me? I have many benefits. Firstly, a really low commission (it is practically absent). Secondly, the developers promised a wide program of programs, and what is most interesting is the ability to send crypto directly to a friend from your contact book. I have not seen such a possibility anywhere else.
